scope.question: Create and review a narrow D+Q bone release-anchor candidate so stable registry-extracted evidence can enter accepted-record exports without promoting broad unfinished candidates.

inputs.summary: Release-readiness showed accepted D+Q downstream records blocked by source, study, finding, outcome, result, and snapshot records created by broader unaccepted candidates.
Broad extraction-refresh candidate remains in_review with full publication extraction and event-specific safety extraction debt.
Broad coverage-repair candidate remains in_review with unresolved review lanes, but contains the PubMed source, study, and finding records needed by the D+Q bone graph.
Resolve release-dependency blockers while preserving the distinction between accepted release state and unfinished extraction or coverage work.

outputs.summary: Added release_accept semantics, created a narrow D+Q bone release-anchor candidate with five accepting supervisor review lanes, promoted it to accepted, and regenerated release outputs so accepted-record blockers dropped to zero.

proposed_records.rationale: Creates the release-anchor candidate, links five accepting review lanes, and records promotion to accepted.
Accepts the registry and PubMed metadata source dependencies for the narrow release anchor.
Accepts registry-extracted D+Q bone records while preserving full publication extraction as debt.
Accepts the scoped senolytics track and hallmark mapping for release-boundary retrieval.
Accepts evidence-map release while preserving synthesis-group pooling blockers.
Accepts aggregate registry adverse-event evidence while preserving event-specific safety extraction debt.

quality_checks.summary: npm run validate:records passed after adding release_accept schemas, the release-anchor candidate, and five review records.
npm run promote:candidate -- senolytics-dq-bone-release-anchor-2026-06-22 --status accepted passed after all required active review lanes accepted.
After export refresh, ops/release-readiness.v1.json reports 5 release-ready accepted candidates, 34 accepted records, and 0 blocked accepted records.
npm run verify:knowledge-base passed after adding the agent-run ledger and regenerated exports.

next_actions: Add the versioned consumer output contract.
Add the generated SQLite or DuckDB read model with provenance audits.
Keep full publication table extraction and event-specific safety extraction for the D+Q bone RCT in extraction debt.
